Package glide.api.models.commands.bitmap

Class BitFieldOptions

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.commands.bitmap.BitFieldOptions
  • public class BitFieldOptions
extends java.lang.Object
    Subcommand arguments for BitmapBaseCommands.bitfield(String, BitFieldSubCommands[]) and BitmapBaseCommands.bitfieldReadOnly(String, BitFieldReadOnlySubCommands[]). Specifies subcommands, bit-encoding type, and offset type.
    See Also:
    valkey.io and valkey.io

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  BitFieldOptions.BitFieldGet
      GET subcommand for getting the value in the binary representation of the string stored in key based on BitFieldOptions.BitEncoding and BitFieldOptions.Offset.
      static class  BitFieldOptions.BitFieldIncrby
      INCRBY subcommand for increasing or decreasing the bits in the binary representation of the string stored in key based on BitFieldOptions.BitEncoding and BitFieldOptions.Offset.
      static class  BitFieldOptions.BitFieldOverflow
      OVERFLOW subcommand that determines the result of the SET or INCRBY commands when an under or overflow occurs.
      static interface  BitFieldOptions.BitFieldReadOnlySubCommands
      Subcommands for bitfieldReadOnly.
      static class  BitFieldOptions.BitFieldSet
      SET subcommand for setting the bits in the binary representation of the string stored in key based on BitFieldOptions.BitEncoding and BitFieldOptions.Offset.
      static interface  BitFieldOptions.BitFieldSubCommands
      Subcommands for bitfield and bitfield_ro.
      static class  BitFieldOptions.Offset
      Offset in the array of bits.
      static class  BitFieldOptions.OffsetMultiplier
      Offset in the array of bits multiplied by the encoding value.
      static class  BitFieldOptions.SignedEncoding
      Specifies that the argument is a signed encoding.
      static class  BitFieldOptions.UnsignedEncoding
      Specifies that the argument is an unsigned encoding.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static java.lang.String GET_COMMAND_STRING
      GET subcommand string to include in the BITFIELD command.
      static java.lang.String INCRBY_COMMAND_STRING
      INCRBY subcommand string to include in the BITFIELD command.
      static java.lang.String OFFSET_MULTIPLIER_PREFIX
      Prefix specifying that the offset uses an encoding multiplier.
      static java.lang.String OVERFLOW_COMMAND_STRING
      OVERFLOW subcommand string to include in the BITFIELD command.
      static java.lang.String SET_COMMAND_STRING
      SET subcommand string to include in the BITFIELD command.
      static java.lang.String SIGNED_ENCODING_PREFIX
      Prefix specifying that the encoding is signed.
      static java.lang.String UNSIGNED_ENCODING_PREFIX
      Prefix specifying that the encoding is unsigned.

      Creates the arguments to be used in BitmapBaseCommands.bitfield(GlideString, BitFieldSubCommands[]) and BitmapBaseCommands.bitfieldReadOnly(GlideString, BitFieldReadOnlySubCommands[]).

    • Method Detail

      • createBitFieldArgs

        public static java.lang.String[] createBitFieldArgs​(BitFieldOptions.BitFieldSubCommands[] subCommands)
        Creates the arguments to be used in BitmapBaseCommands.bitfield(String, BitFieldSubCommands[]) and BitmapBaseCommands.bitfieldReadOnly(String, BitFieldReadOnlySubCommands[]).
        Parameters:
        subCommands - commands that holds arguments to be included in the argument String array.
        Returns:
        a String array that holds the sub commands and their arguments.

      • createBitFieldGlideStringArgs

        public static GlideString[] createBitFieldGlideStringArgs​(BitFieldOptions.BitFieldSubCommands[] subCommands)
        Creates the arguments to be used in BitmapBaseCommands.bitfield(GlideString, BitFieldSubCommands[]) and BitmapBaseCommands.bitfieldReadOnly(GlideString, BitFieldReadOnlySubCommands[]).
        Parameters:
        subCommands - commands that holds arguments to be included in the argument String array.
        Returns:
        a GlideString array that holds the sub commands and their arguments.
